name: ca3
description: Connect Codex to CA3, a user-owned context hub for saved notes and attachments.

interface.shortDescription: Use CA3 notes and attachments from Codex.
interface.longDescription: CA3 is a user-owned AI context hub. This plugin connects Codex to CA3 through OAuth MCP so Codex can read and write scoped notes and attachments when the user asks or when project instructions make CA3 the appropriate shared context surface.
defaultPrompt: Use CA3 to remember this project context.
Search CA3 for related notes before changing code.
Save this durable project decision in CA3 with the reason it matters later.
